rationale: Segfault/core dump when master doesn't respond; memory corruption in C pool code, not a spec rule violation.
Wrong exception type on connection error vs. documentation; PHP-specific API contract, no cross-driver spec rule.
Sort order broken in PHP driver; user-reported issue with no named spec rule, likely a BSON encoding or cursor bug.
MongoCode without scope stored as type 15 instead of 13; old pecl-mongo BSON quirk, no specific BSON spec rule named.
PHP Reflection API doesn't introspect Mongo class constructors; PHP-specific API ergonomics, not a MongoDB spec area.
Uneven secondary read distribution; performance/load-balancing improvement, no specific server-selection spec rule violated.
PHP-specific __set_state static method broken for MongoId; PHP language binding bug, no MongoDB spec involvement.
Segfault in Apache with replica set auth; C-level memory corruption crash, not a spec deviation.
Explicitly states Java and Python listCollections includes system.indexes; filed to align PHP behavior with those drivers.
getHosts() regression in 1.2.7 returning incomplete replica set info; driver implementation regression, no spec rule named.
Document field named 'err' triggers false MongoCursorException; internal error-detection logic bug, not a spec violation.
killCursor sent on wrong connection; implementation bug with empty description, no spec rule explicitly named.
MongoLog documentation improvement; docs/logging improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
Regression: replica set connection silently hangs after upgrade; driver regression, not a named spec rule violation.
GridFS spec requires atomicity: chunks must not be written if fs.files insert fails; driver violates this requirement.
PHP processes segfault when primary rejoins replica set; C-level crash/memory bug, not a spec rule violation.
SIGSEGV null pointer dereference in connect.c when replica set node goes down; memory safety bug, not spec deviation.
Segfault when curl POST + Mongo replica set close in sequence; C-level memory bug, not a spec violation.
Missing source directory in PECL package tarball; packaging/release issue, no spec involvement.
Spurious 'broken pipe' exception on sharded insert; networking/socket error handling bug, not a spec deviation.
MongoCursorException when native_long disabled on 64-bit; PHP integer representation edge case, not a spec rule.
Updating field named '0' via PHP array silently fails; PHP array-to-BSON encoding quirk, no specific spec rule named.
Segfault in GridFS storeBytes after 1.2.9 upgrade; memory management regression (zend object store), not a spec deviation.
getGridFS+storeBytes hangs indefinitely in 1.2.9; regression/hang bug, no spec rule named.
Compilation failure with PHP < 5.3 due to undefined Z_DELREF_P symbol; build/portability issue.
Cursor timeout leaves socket open; C-level connection lifecycle bug (owner pid not set), not a spec rule.
Exception on insert after primary steps down with Apache persistent connections; failover handling bug, no specific spec rule.
Iterator key is empty string when _id excluded; PHP cursor key() implementation bug, no spec rule explicitly violated.
Segfault in gridfs.c storeFile; duplicate of PHP-343, same zend object store memory bug.
Recurring socket exceptions after a few days with sharded read; networking/socket reliability bug, not a spec deviation.
Failover to new primary not working; duplicate of PHP-329, same replica set failover bug.
Joke ticket about a physical support box table being too large; entirely unrelated to software.
getHosts() segfaults on non-replica-set connection; null pointer dereference, implementation crash not a spec violation.
GridFS spec requires uploadDate in file metadata; driver omits it from MongoGridFSFile->file property.
Segfault in gridfs.c when iterating with _id in result; null pointer dereference in C code, not a spec rule.
Documentation improvement for batchSize; references Java driver docs as example but is a docs-only ticket.
Windows DLL fails to load due to missing zend_new_interned_string; build/packaging issue.
Segfault in GridFS when long_as_object enabled; C memory bug triggered by PHP ini option, not a spec deviation.
Apache crash on concurrent connections; C-level crash under concurrency, not a spec rule violation.
Replica set connection broken after upgrade from 1.0.11; version regression, not a named spec rule violation.
Cursor spec requires killCursors when limit is exhausted; driver defers close to end of request instead.
Driver crashes when FD count exceeds FD_SETSIZE; OS-level fd_set overflow, implementation bug not a spec violation.
findOne slower with index; query performance issue, no spec rule involved.
Feature request to expose generic query flag/option setting; new API feature, driver not currently doing anything wrong.
Arbiter in seed list causes wonky behavior; thin description referencing CS-3284 only, insufficient detail to classify as spec violation.
BSON spec: Date must preserve milliseconds; bson_encode/bson_decode drops sub-second usec from MongoDate.
Endless loop when GridFS file doesn't exist; error handling bug in driver, not a spec rule violation.
getPID() returns wrong PID for custom MongoId; thin description referencing external ticket, PHP-specific API bug.
validate(true) doesn't pass full:true flag; driver API wrapper bug, not a MongoDB cross-driver spec area.
Documentation touch-up for ensureIndex background option; docs-only improvement ticket.
